revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1190年代の各国]] [[ar:Category:عقد 1190 حسب البلد]] [[az:Category:1190-cı illərdə ölkələr]] [[commons:Category:1190s by country]] [[es:Category:Países en los años 1190]] [[fa:Category:دهه ۱۱۹۰ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[hy:Category:1190-ականներ ըստ երկրի]] [[ko:Category:나라별 1190년대]] [[no:Category:1190-årene etter land]] [[ru:Category:1190-е годы по странам]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 1190'lar]] [[uk:Category:1190-ті за країною]] [[ur:Category:1190ء کی دہائی بلحاظ ملک]] [[zh:Category:1190年代各國]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1190s_in_Japan]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Removing from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8088357)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
